rationale: Both candidates converge on the same correct diagnosis matching the thread (regression from #4527 nulled the inter-stage payload in the non-async-chunk branch, fixed by merged PR #4792, already folded into the 0.24 rebase commit) — correctness is comparable. X is delivered as a clean, maintainer-ready answer with dense file:line grounding across the coordinator, scheduler, connector, and deploy-config, plus concrete remediation options and an explicit 'keep closed' verdict mirroring the actual resolution. Y reaches the same conclusion but is dumped as a raw, duplicated internal run-report with truncated/cut-off markdown at the end, making it far less usable as an actual response to the reporter despite decent (even slightly broader, e.g. NPU files) grounding.
